Interface JsonListNode

All Superinterfaces:
Collection<Object>, Iterable<Object>, JsonBaseNode, JsonPart, List<Object>, SequencedCollection<Object>
All Known Implementing Classes:
JsonLinkedList, JsonList
public sealed interface JsonListNode extends JsonBaseNode, List<Object> permits JsonList, JsonLinkedList
Since:
12.0.4

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    default <T,U> U
    convertTo(Supplier<T> jsonObjectSupplier, TriConsumer<T,String,Object> putOperation, Supplier<U> jsonArraySupplier, BiConsumer<U,Object> addOperation, boolean parseJsonValue)
    class CustomJsonMap extends JsonMap { } class CustomList extends JsonList { } JsonMap jsonMap = new JsonMap(); jsonMap.put("number", new JsonValue("14", JsonValueType.NUMBER)); jsonMap.put("string", "string value"); jsonMap.put("bool", true); jsonMap.put("fornull1", new JsonValue()); jsonMap.put("fornull2", null); JsonList jsonList = new JsonList(); jsonList.add(jsonMap); CustomList convertedObject = jsonList.convertTo( CustomJsonMap::new, CustomJsonMap::put, CustomList::new, CustomList::add, true);

  • Method Details

    • getValueAsString

      default String getValueAsString(int index)
      Parameters:
      index - the index to get value.
      Returns:
      the string value or null.
      Since:
      12.0.4

    • getValueAsString

      default String getValueAsString(int index, boolean decodeUnicodeCharsSequence)
      Parameters:
      index - the index to get value.
      decodeUnicodeCharsSequence - true to decode the Unicode chars sequences like \u2122 to Java chars or false to use as it is.
      Returns:
      the string value or null.
      Since:
      12.0.11

    • getValueAsBoolean

      default Boolean getValueAsBoolean(int index)
      Parameters:
      index - the index to get value.
      Returns:
      the Boolean value or null. It will throw exception if the value is not parsable to Boolean.
      Since:
      12.0.11

    • getValueAsInteger

      default Integer getValueAsInteger(int index)
      Parameters:
      index - the index to get value.
      Returns:
      the Integer value or null. It will throw exception if the value is not parsable to integer.
      Since:
      12.0.4

    • getValueAsLong

      default Long getValueAsLong(int index)
      Parameters:
      index - the index to get value.
      Returns:
      the Long value or null. It will throw exception if the value is not parsable to Long.
      Since:
      12.0.4

    • getValueAsDouble

      default Double getValueAsDouble(int index)
      Parameters:
      index - the index to get value.
      Returns:
      the Double value or null. It will throw exception if the value is not parsable to Double.

      12.0.4

    • getValueAsBigInteger

      default BigInteger getValueAsBigInteger(int index)
      Parameters:
      index - the index to get value.
      Returns:
      the BigInteger value or null. It will throw exception if the value is not parsable to BigInteger.

      12.0.4

    • getValueAsBigDecimal

      default BigDecimal getValueAsBigDecimal(int index)
      Parameters:
      index - the index to get value.
      Returns:
      the BigDecimal value or null. It will throw exception if the value is not parsable to BigDecimal.
      Since:
      12.0.4

    • getValueAsJsonValue

      default JsonValue getValueAsJsonValue(int index)
      Parameters:
      index - the index to get value.
      Returns:
      the value as JsonValue object.
      Throws:
      InvalidValueException - if the value is not suitable to create an object of JsonValue.
      Since:
      12.0.11

    • getValueAsJsonBaseNode

      default JsonBaseNode getValueAsJsonBaseNode(int index)
      Parameters:
      index - the index to get value.
      Returns:
      the JsonBaseNode value or null. It will throw exception if the value is not an instance of JsonBaseNode.
      Since:
      12.0.11

    • getValueAsJsonListNode

      default JsonListNode getValueAsJsonListNode(int index)
      Parameters:
      index - the index to get value.
      Returns:
      the JsonListNode value or null. It will throw exception if the value is not an instance of JsonListNode.
      Since:
      12.0.4

    • getValueAsJsonMapNode

      default JsonMapNode getValueAsJsonMapNode(int index)
      Parameters:
      index - the index to get value.
      Returns:
      the JsonMapNode value or null. It will throw exception if the value is not an instance of JsonMapNode.
      Since:
      12.0.4

      Returns:

    • toOutputStream

      default void toOutputStream(OutputStream outputStream, Charset charset, boolean flushOnWrite) throws IOException
      Specified by:
      toOutputStream in interface JsonBaseNode
      Parameters:
      outputStream - the OutputStream to write the json.
      charset - the charset
      flushOnWrite - true to flush after each write operation otherwise false.
      Throws:
      IOException - if writing to OutputStream throws an exception.
      Since:
      12.0.9

    • toWffBMArray

      default WffBMArray toWffBMArray()
      NB: The array should not contain null values.
      Returns:
      the WffBMArray.
      Since:
      12.0.4

    • convertTo

      default <T,U> U convertTo(Supplier<T> jsonObjectSupplier, TriConsumer<T,String,Object> putOperation, Supplier<U> jsonArraySupplier, BiConsumer<U,Object> addOperation, boolean parseJsonValue)
              class CustomJsonMap extends JsonMap {
        }
        class CustomList extends JsonList {
        }

        JsonMap jsonMap = new  JsonMap();
        jsonMap.put("number", new JsonValue("14", JsonValueType.NUMBER));
        jsonMap.put("string", "string value");
        jsonMap.put("bool", true);
        jsonMap.put("fornull1", new JsonValue());
        jsonMap.put("fornull2", null);

        JsonList jsonList = new JsonList();
        jsonList.add(jsonMap);

        CustomList convertedObject = jsonList.convertTo(
        CustomJsonMap::new, CustomJsonMap::put, CustomList::new, CustomList::add, true);
      Type Parameters:
      T - the JSON object class type.
      U - the JSON array class type. It is the return type of the method.
      Parameters:
      jsonObjectSupplier - the supplier to provide new JSON object.
      putOperation - the TriConsumer of the supplied JSON object, the key and value.
      jsonArraySupplier - the supplier to provide new JSON array.
      addOperation - the BiConsumer of the supplied JSON array and value.
      parseJsonValue - true to parse the JsonValue to appropriate value types if the underlying value is a JsonValue object.
      Returns:
      the converted object.
      Since:
      12.0.11
